login.title: Sign in
login.body: Use your platform account to continue.
login.chooseProvider: Choose how you want to continue.
login.error: Sign-in methods could not be loaded.
login.empty: No sign-in methods are currently available.

providerHelp.azure: Continue with your Microsoft work or school account.

logSearch.label: Log search
logSearch.description: Search structured platform logs by request, trace, tenant, or text

validation.tooShort: Display name must be at least 2 characters
validation.tooLong: Display name must be 120 characters or fewer
validation.invalid: Display name must not contain control characters

adminLogs.title: Log search
adminLogs.subtitle: Search structured platform logs by request, trace, tenant, actor, or text.
adminLogs.error: Log search is unavailable. Try again shortly.

prompt.title: Search platform logs
prompt.description: Set filters and run a search to see matching log entries.

empty.title: No logs matched
empty.description: No log entries matched the current filters and time range.

error.signInAgain: Please sign in again to continue.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

card.membersDescription: Invite people, change roles, and remove members.
card.authenticationDescription: Configure login providers, identity providers, MFA, and sessions.
card.featuresDescription: Enable or disable platform capabilities for this tenant.
card.configurationDescription: Manage typed platform configuration for this tenant.
card.domainsDescription: Add custom domains and prove ownership via DNS.
card.storageDescription: Check object-storage readiness and tenant isolation.
card.observabilityDescription: Check log ingestion, tenant-scoped query, and label hygiene.
card.webhooksDescription: Subscribe endpoints to events with signed, logged deliveries.
card.platformDescription: Local service health, background workers, and the proof ladder.
card.readinessDescription: See what's configured and what's left to set up.
card.entitlementsDescription: See and assign what this tenant is allowed to use.
card.usageDescription: See recorded usage and set quota limits per capability.

entitlements.title: Entitlements
entitlements.description: What this tenant is allowed to use. Entitlements are assigned by operators and are not feature flags; absence means unavailable.
entitlements.enterTenant: Select a tenant to view and manage its entitlements.
entitlements.readOnlyNote: This is a read-only view of your tenant's entitlements. Assignment is operator-only.
entitlements.quotaNote: Quota enforcement is not yet active (Phase 2); only entitlement availability is shown.

usage.title: Usage & quotas
usage.description: Recorded usage per capability and the quota limits that gate it. Quota decisions are server-side; billing is not part of this surface.
usage.enterTenant: Select a tenant to view its usage and set quota limits.
usage.noQuotas: No quotas configured for this tenant.
usage.readOnlyNote: This is a read-only view of your tenant's usage and quotas. Limits are set by operators.

config.title: Configuration
config.description: Typed platform configuration for this organisation.

appName.label: Application name
appName.description: Display name shown to this tenant's users.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Default colour theme for this tenant.

sessionWarning.label: Session expiry warning
sessionWarning.description: Warn users before their session expires.

webhookHeaders.label: Webhook headers
webhookHeaders.description: Default headers attached to outbound webhooks (JSON).

email.title: Email sender
email.description: Configure the address transactional email is sent from, and verify it.
email.error: Email sender settings could not be loaded.
email.secretHelper: Leave blank to keep the existing secret.
email.saveError: Could not save the email sender settings. Please try again.
email.testError: Could not send the test email. Please try again.

readiness.configured: Your email sender is configured and verified.
readiness.missing_sender: No sender is configured yet. Choose a provider and set a from address.
readiness.missing_credential: A credential is required for this provider. Add it to continue.
readiness.invalid_credential: The stored credential was rejected. Update it and test again.
readiness.provider_unreachable: The email provider could not be reached. Check the settings and try again.
readiness.sender_unverified: The sender domain is not yet verified.
readiness.unknown: The sender has not been verified yet — send a test email to confirm it works.

testResult.sent: Test email sent — check the destination mailbox.
testResult.invalid_recipient: Enter a valid recipient email address.
testResult.missing_sender: Configure a from address before sending a test.
testResult.missing_credential: Add the provider credential before sending a test.
testResult.invalid_credential: The credential was rejected by the provider.
testResult.provider_unreachable: The provider could not be reached.

domains.title: Custom domains
domains.description: Add a custom domain, prove ownership via a DNS TXT record, and track its readiness.
domains.error: Custom domains could not be loaded.
domains.addError: Could not add the domain. Check the format and try again.
domains.added: Domain added — publish the DNS record below, then verify.
domains.verifyError: Could not verify the domain. Please try again.
domains.txtHelper: Create this DNS TXT record at your DNS provider, then click Verify.
domains.empty: No custom domains yet. Add one above.

readiness.no_domains: No custom domain is configured. Your tenant works on the shared domain.
readiness.pending_verification: A domain is awaiting DNS verification. Publish the TXT record and verify.
readiness.verified: At least one custom domain has proven DNS ownership.
readiness.degraded: Custom domain status could not be determined right now.

domains.canonicalLocalNote: Canonical is based on locally proven routing only — no redirect is applied.
domains.activateError: Could not activate the domain. Verify DNS ownership first.
domains.activated: Domain activated on the auth client.
domains.probeError: The local routing probe failed to run.
domains.probeMatched: Local routing proven — the domain reaches this tenant through the local proxy.
domains.probeUnmatched: Probe completed: routing is NOT proven (proxy unreachable or wrong tenant context).
domains.setCanonicalError: Canonical requires verified ownership, an active auth client, and proven routing.
domains.canonicalSet: Canonical marker set. No redirect is active (policy: no_redirect).
domains.canonicalNoRedirect: No redirect is active — public cutover not proven.
domains.addConflictError: This domain is already claimed by another organisation.

storage.title: Object storage
storage.description: Per-tenant object storage readiness and isolation.
storage.error: Storage readiness could not be loaded.
storage.probeError: Could not run the storage probe. Please try again.

readiness.configured: Object storage is reachable and tenant-isolated.
readiness.not_configured: Object storage is not configured for this platform yet.
readiness.provider_unreachable: The object store could not be reached.
readiness.isolation_failed: Tenant isolation could not be confirmed.
readiness.unknown: Storage readiness is unknown — run a probe to check.

observability.title: Observability
observability.description: Per-tenant log ingestion readiness and label hygiene.
observability.error: Observability readiness could not be loaded.

readiness.configured: Log ingestion is reachable and tenant-scoped queries work.
readiness.not_configured: No log backend is configured for this platform yet.
readiness.provider_unreachable: The log backend could not be reached.
readiness.degraded: Logging is reachable but a signal is not healthy.
readiness.unknown: Observability readiness is unknown right now.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Send signed event notifications to your own endpoints.
webhooks.addError: Could not add the webhook. Check the URL and events.
webhooks.secretHelper: Copy this secret now — it is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.
webhooks.empty: No webhooks yet. Add one above.
webhooks.rotated: Signing secret rotated — copy the new value.
webhooks.rotateError: Could not rotate the secret. Please try again.
webhooks.testError: Could not send the test event. Please try again.
webhooks.redriven: Dead delivery requeued — the worker will retry it.
webhooks.redriveError: Could not redrive the delivery. Please try again.

readiness.configured: At least one enabled webhook is configured.
readiness.has_dead_deliveries: Some deliveries failed permanently — redrive them to retry.
readiness.degraded: Webhook configuration could not be read right now.
readiness.unknown: Webhooks readiness is unknown right now.

platform.title: Platform operations
platform.description: Local service health, background workers, and the proof ladder. Local-only — not a production readiness signal.
platform.error: Platform service readiness could not be loaded.
platform.inMemoryNote: In-memory heartbeat — resets on process restart.
platform.proofNote: Read-only index — run proofs from the CLI (npm run proof:*). All proofs are local-only.

redis.label: Redis
redis.detail: Structural check only — wired at startup, not actively pinged.

mock_oidc.label: Mock OIDC
mock_oidc.detail: Local login fixture — not a real identity provider.

overview.title: Administration
overview.description: Manage your organisation's members, authentication, and features.
overview.empty: You do not have access to any administration sections.

members.title: Members
members.description: People with access to this organisation.
members.inviteError: The invitation could not be sent. Please try again.
members.usernameError: The username could not be saved. Please try again.
members.auditTrailDeferred: Per-member audit trail: search the admin log by actor (deferred).

features.title: Features
features.description: Enable or disable platform capabilities for this tenant.

keyDescription.audit_export: Export audit events to external systems.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Login options and security policy for this organisation.
auth.notConfigured: This is not configured for your organisation yet.

providers.enabledLabel: Sign-in options offered to your users
providers.noneAvailable: No third-party sign-in providers are available in this environment.

idps.deleteConfirm: Delete the identity provider "{alias}"? Users will no longer be able to sign in through it.
idps.createError: Could not create the identity provider. Check the fields and try again.
idps.updateError: Could not update the identity provider. Please try again.
idps.deleteError: Could not delete the identity provider. Please try again.
idps.clientSecretEditHelper: Leave blank to keep the existing secret.
idps.testError: Could not run the connection test. Please try again.

testResult.ok: Connection OK — issuer and signing keys validated.
testResult.issuer_mismatch: Issuer mismatch — the discovery issuer does not match.
testResult.jwks_invalid: No usable signing keys were found at the JWKS endpoint.
testResult.unreachable: The provider endpoint could not be reached.
testResult.invalid_document: The discovery document was invalid or incomplete.
testResult.not_configured: No issuer is configured for this provider yet.

idps.discoveryHelper: Paste the provider's issuer; we validate it and fill the endpoints below.
idps.discoveryError: Could not import the discovery document. Check the URL and try again.
idps.mappingHelper: Map upstream claims to user attributes and to tenant roles. Applied to the identity provider; not yet exercised through a live login.
idps.mappingError: Could not save the mapping. Please try again.

mfa.saveError: Could not save the MFA policy. Please try again.

session.saveError: Could not save the session policy. Please try again.
session.invalid: Enter a whole number within the allowed range.

readiness.heading: Authentication settings status
readiness.configured: Editing is enabled — the realm-admin credential is active.
readiness.missing_credential: Editing is unavailable: no identity credential is configured for your organisation. Please contact your system administrator to provision one.
readiness.invalid_credential: Editing is unavailable: the identity credential was rejected. Please contact your system administrator to rotate it.
readiness.forbidden_realm_operation: Editing is unavailable: the identity credential lacks the required permissions. Please contact your system administrator.
readiness.realm_unreachable: Editing is unavailable: the identity service could not be reached. Please try again later, or contact your system administrator if this persists.

readiness.title: Tenant readiness
readiness.description: Track every control-plane capability and drive this tenant to fully configured.

overallHint.ready: This tenant is fully configured and usable.
overallHint.blocked: Required setup is missing — the tenant is not yet usable.
overallHint.degraded: A required capability is misconfigured and needs attention.
overallHint.unknown: Some capabilities could not be checked.

tenant_record.label: Tenant record
tenant_record.description: The organisation exists in the platform.

tenant_fqdn.label: Tenant domain
tenant_fqdn.description: The tenant's hostname is known and resolvable.

tenant_admin.label: Tenant administrators
tenant_admin.description: At least one active administrator can manage the tenant.
tenant_admin.action: Invite an administrator from the Members section.

member_administration.label: Member administration
member_administration.description: Invite people, change roles, and remove members.

roles_permissions.label: Roles & permissions
roles_permissions.description: Role-based access control for tenant members.

auth_credential.label: Identity credential
auth_credential.description: The realm-admin credential that lets this tenant manage its own authentication.
auth_credential.action: Contact your system administrator to provision or rotate the credential.

auth_providers.label: Login providers
auth_providers.description: Which sign-in options are offered to your users.

mfa_policy.label: Multi-factor authentication
mfa_policy.description: Whether and how a second factor is required.

idp_configuration.label: Identity providers
idp_configuration.description: External OIDC / social identity providers for single sign-on.
idp_configuration.action: Add an identity provider if external login is expected.

feature_config.label: Features & configuration
feature_config.description: Feature flags and governed configuration values.

tenant_domains.label: Custom domains
tenant_domains.action: Add a custom domain and verify it via DNS.

email_sender.label: Email & sender
email_sender.action: Configure an email sender and send a test message.

audit.label: Audit trail
audit.description: Who changed what, when, across the control plane.

storage.label: Object storage
storage.action: Configure object storage and run a readiness probe.

observability.label: Observability
observability.description: Logs, traces, and dashboards for the tenant.
observability.action: Check log ingestion readiness for this tenant.

integrations_webhooks.label: Integrations & webhooks
integrations_webhooks.action: Add a webhook endpoint and send a test event.

oidc_discovery.label: OIDC discovery
oidc_discovery.description: Configure providers from an OIDC discovery URL.

oidc_claim_mapping.label: Claim mapping
oidc_claim_mapping.description: Map provider claims to user attributes.

oidc_group_role_mapping.label: Group / role mapping
oidc_group_role_mapping.description: Map provider groups to tenant roles.

oidc_test_connection.label: Test connection
oidc_test_connection.description: Verify a provider configuration before saving.

oidc_callback_display.label: Callback URL
oidc_callback_display.description: Show the redirect/callback URL to configure at the provider.

oidc_login_simulation.label: Login simulation
oidc_login_simulation.description: Simulate a login to validate the end-to-end flow.

tenant_host_identity_resolution.label: Host identity resolution
tenant_host_identity_resolution.description: Every request host is classified (apex, tenant, reserved, custom, malformed) and resolved to a tenant only via DB-verified slug or active custom domain.

tenant_domain_activation.label: Custom domain activation
tenant_domain_activation.description: DNS-verified custom domains can be activated on the tenant auth client under the domains permission, with audit and explicit lifecycle state.

tenant_canonical_domain.label: Canonical domain
tenant_canonical_domain.description: One canonical domain per tenant, allowed only after ownership, activation, and routing are proven. No redirect is applied (local-only proof; public cutover deferred).

tenant_auth_custom_domain_callback.label: Custom domain sign-in origin
tenant_auth_custom_domain_callback.description: Sign-in on an active custom domain derives the correct tenant realm and callback URL (locally proven derivation; real IdP login remains deferred).

tenant_service_clickthrough.label: Operational tool access policy
tenant_service_clickthrough.description: Tool clickthroughs follow an explicit policy: Keycloak is tenant-scoped (own slug, Keycloak-authenticated console); all other tools are platform-operator only or not exposed.

tenant_groups.label: Groups
tenant_groups.description: Tenant group management is available through the API; an admin UI has not been built yet.

tenant_suborgs.label: Sub-organisations
tenant_suborgs.description: Sub-organisation management is available through the API; an admin UI has not been built yet.

delegated_admin_roles.label: Delegated admin roles
delegated_admin_roles.description: Narrow delegated roles (domain manager, auth manager, integration manager, observability reader) are not yet available — administration uses the built-in tenant roles.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.description: You do not have the required permission: {permission}

error.saveFailed: Failed to save. Please try again.
error.title: Something went wrong
error.sessionUnavailable: Unable to load your session. Please refresh the page.
error.updateFailed: Failed to save changes. Please try again.

error.unauthenticated: You need to sign in to continue
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
error.emailUnverified: Your email address has not been verified
error.authStateMismatch: Authentication flow error ? please try again
error.unverifiedOrMissingEmail: Unverified or missing email ? login refused
error.notEntitled: This tenant is not entitled to use this capability
error.quotaExceeded: Usage quota exceeded for this capability
error.invalidMeterQuantity: Meter quantity must be a finite number
error.negativeMeterQuantity: Meter quantity cannot be negative unless recorded as an adjustment
error.notImplemented: This feature is not yet available
error.graphqlInvalidDocument: The GraphQL document could not be parsed
